{{Infobox character
| name = Nurita
| species = Alien
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] is [[Leah]]'s aunt.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] is a Myrian who has taken charge of the surviving villagers.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Nurita]] has a niece who is [[Leah]]'s sister.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] spent two years with her aunt [[Nurita]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
